    Package Description
    dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui

    • Uses of Item in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui

      Methods in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui that return Item 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected Item<T,S> ConfigBasedGuiBase.asyncItem(String id, int slot, ItemBuilder item)
      Create a new async item.
      protected Item<T,S> ConfigBasedGuiBase.asyncItem(String id, String slot, ItemBuilder item)
      Create a new async item, from a string slot.
      protected Item<T,S> ConfigBasedGuiBase.item(String id, int slot, ItemBuilder item)
      Create a new item.
      protected Item<T,S> ConfigBasedGuiBase.item(String id, ItemBuilder item)
      Create a new item, with no slot.
      protected Item<T,S> ConfigBasedGuiBase.item(String id, String slot, ItemBuilder item)
      Create a new item.

      void ConfigBasedGuiBase.setItem(Item<T,S> item)
      Set an item in the gui.

    • Uses of Item in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items

      Subclasses of Item in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AsyncItem<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
      An async item is an item that gets loaded async.
      class  StaticItem<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
      A static item is an item that doesn't get saved to the config.
      Methods in dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items that return Item 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Item<T,S> Item.asList(AsList<?,T,S> asList)
      Set the item as a list.

      Set the click action for the item.
      Item<T,S> Item.eventHandler(ItemEventHandler<T,S> eventHandler)
      Set the event handler for the item.
      Item<T,S> Item.fallbackItem(ItemBuilder fallbackItem)
      Set the fallback item for the item.
      Item<T,S> AsyncItem.loader(ItemBuilder loader)

      Alias for clickAction(BiConsumer)
      Item<T,S> Item.replacer(Replacer<S> replacer)
      Add a replacer to the item.
      Item<T,S> Item.show(BiPredicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player,S> show)
      Set a condition for the item to be shown.
      Item<T,S> Item.show(Predicate<org.bukkit.entity.Player> show)
      Set a condition for the item to be shown.
      Item<T,S> Item.stringMaterial(String stringMaterial)
      Use a string as a material.
